TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_mkibuhw, title = mkibuhw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/mkibuhw} }

S.FORM: alang mkibuhw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 160 buwan, 450 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 183 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 267 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 30%, Amis 6%, Tayan 3%, Puyuma 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na mkibuhw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na mkibuhw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na mkibuhw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na mkibuhw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na mkibuhw hya' ga gnaalu. tay 'llaw na mkibuhw hya' ga Cikeliwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang mkibuhw ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 160 buwan, 450 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 41% kyan ku 183 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 59% kyan ku 267 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 30%, Amis 6%, Tayan 3%, Puyuma 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na mkibuhw hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na mkibuhw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na mkibuhw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na mkibuhw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na mkibuhw hya' ga gnaalu. tay 'llaw na mkibuhw hya' ga Cikeliwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mkiβuħw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, pujuma *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mkiβuħw ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na mkiβuħw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na mkiβuħw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mkiβuħw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mkiβuħw ħjaʔ ɣa ɣnaalu. taj ʔllaw na mkiβuħw ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikeliwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
